bock_cote.archetype: The intellectual immigrant anti-immigrant / Identity philosopher
bock_cote.best_takedown_angle: The cosmic irony of a Québécois immigrant becoming France's leading voice against immigration. He literally did the thing he argues against—moved to another country and insisted his culture was under threat. It's like a vegetarian opening a steakhouse.
visual_gags: Canadian passport next to anti-immigration books
Academic credentials as shield for radical takes
bock_cote.combo_partners: Praud (his talk show host), Zemmour (fellow identity warrior), Le Pen (philosophical ally), Bolloré (his employer's boss)
bock_cote.target_audience: Identity politics critics, anti-woke crowd, CNews regular viewers, anyone who appreciates irony

marechal.name: Marion Maréchal
marechal.bio: Marine Le Pen's niece who was elected as France's youngest-ever deputy at age 22 in 2012 for the Front National. She quit politics in 2017, returned to join Zemmour's Reconquête in 2022, led their European election list in June 2024 (getting elected MEP), and was EXPELLED from the party by Zemmour on June 12, 2024—just three days after the election—after she publicly called on voters to support RN candidates in the snap legislative elections. She's been in three parties and expelled from two. In January 2026, she published a book positioning herself as 'guardian of the Le Pen heritage,' and sources say she's in talks to return to the RN fold. Met with Italian PM Giorgia Meloni in Rome in May 2025. At 35, she's been through more political divorces than most politicians have in a lifetime.
marechal.meme_summary: The political nomad who's been in three parties, expelled from two, and is now shopping for a fourth—the ultimate 'it's not me, it's the party' politician.
marechal.best_takedown_angle: Mock her inability to stay in any political party—FN, Reconquête, now maybe back to RN? She treats political parties like dating apps. The Le Pen niece who can't commit to anything except ambition.
visual_gags: Party membership cards being torn up
Three party logos with X marks
catchphrases: Libérer à l'intérieur, protéger à l'extérieur
Ce n'est pas un livre pour régler mes comptes
marechal.combo_partners: Le Pen (the aunt-niece dynasty drama), Zemmour (the bitter ex who expelled her), Knafo (Reconquête's other woman), Bardella (the real heir vs the blood heir), Meloni (international far-right networking)
marechal.target_audience: Far-right political watchers, dynasty drama fans, anyone who follows the Le Pen family saga, political gossip enthusiasts

aulas.name: Jean-Michel Aulas
aulas.role: Candidat à la mairie de Lyon 2026 / Ancien président de l'Olympique Lyonnais
aulas.party: Divers droite (soutenu par LR, Renaissance, Horizons, MoDem, UDI)
aulas.bio: The legendary president of Olympique Lyonnais for 36 years (1987-2023) who transformed a modest club into a European football powerhouse. After selling his stake, he announced his candidacy for Lyon mayor in 2025, backed by a massive center-right coalition (LR, Renaissance, Horizons, MoDem, UDI). At 75, he's bringing football management tactics to city politics—promising to make Lyon 'the capital of sport and culture.' His main opponent is the incumbent green mayor Grégory Doucet. The race is essentially Football Capitalism vs Green Ecology, and it's the most entertaining municipal race in France after Paris.
aulas.meme_summary: The football boss who thinks running a city is like managing a club—36 years at OL and now he wants to be the player-manager of Lyon itself.
aulas.best_takedown_angle: Mock the absurd leap from football to politics. Managing transfers and managing trash collection are NOT the same skill set. At 75, he's the oldest political rookie in France—like a retiree starting a new career as a DJ.
visual_gags: Football tactics board applied to city planning
OL jersey with 'Maire' on the back
Transfer window but for municipal employees
Champions League trophy next to mayoral sash
catchphrases: Lyon, capitale du sport et de la culture
Une ville comme un grand club
aulas.combo_partners: Doucet (green rival—ecology vs football), Wauquiez (regional LR ally), Macron (centrist coalition supporter), Philippe (Horizons connection)
aulas.target_audience: Football fans, Lyon residents, center-right voters, anyone amused by sports-to-politics crossovers
memes: 36 years at OL, day 1 in politics

perdriau.name: Gaël Perdriau
perdriau.bio: The mayor of Saint-Étienne who was convicted in December 2025 to FOUR YEARS in prison for blackmailing a political rival with a secretly filmed sex tape involving a male sex worker. He also received a five-year ban from holding public office. The conviction effectively ends his political career and is one of the most spectacular political scandals in recent French history. He orchestrated the filming of his first deputy in a compromising situation and used the tape to keep him in line politically. The court called it 'an unprecedented abuse of power.' He was still technically mayor when convicted.
perdriau.meme_summary: The mayor who filmed his deputy's sex tape and used it as a political weapon—France's answer to 'House of Cards' but with worse production values.
perdriau.best_takedown_angle: The scandal writes itself—a mayor who secretly filmed a sex tape of his own deputy to blackmail him. You can't parody this because reality already outdid any comedy writer. Netflix couldn't have scripted it better.
visual_gags: Hidden camera setup in municipal building
House of Cards poster but with Saint-Étienne backdrop
The sex tape as municipal document
perdriau.combo_partners: Sarkozy (convicted politicians club), Dati (legal troubles while in office), Le Pen (five-year ban club), Ciotti (LR's scandal collection)
perdriau.target_audience: Political scandal enthusiasts, true crime fans, anyone who thinks French politics can't get crazier, House of Cards viewers

bayrou.name: François Bayrou
bayrou.role: Haut-commissaire au Plan / Ancien Premier Ministre
bayrou.bio: The eternal centrist who FINALLY became Prime Minister in December 2024 after decades of trying to be relevant—only to be toppled by a censure motion in September 2025, lasting barely nine months. The founder of MoDem, three-time presidential candidate (2002, 2007, 2012), and perennial kingmaker of the center, Bayrou was France's third PM in under a year when Macron appointed him after Barnier's fall. His government survived by NOT being censured by the RN (who implicitly kept him alive), until they pulled the plug. He's the political equivalent of a participation trophy: always there, never quite winning, occasionally briefly in charge before being discarded. From Béarn in southwestern France, he cultivated a 'rural wisdom' image while running the most classic centrist operation in French politics for 30 years.
bayrou.meme_summary: The centrist who waited 30 years to be PM and lasted 9 months—like finally getting your dream restaurant reservation and then getting food poisoning.
bayrou.best_takedown_angle: Mock the 30-year wait for the top job only to be censured in record time. He's the political equivalent of 'be careful what you wish for.' Three presidential runs, decades of positioning, and his PM tenure was shorter than a Netflix subscription.
visual_gags: Béarn rural wisdom meets Paris politics
catchphrases: La France a besoin de rassemblement
bayrou.combo_partners: Macron (the president who gave him PM then watched him fall), Le Pen (kept him alive then killed him), Philippe (two centrists competing), Barrot (MoDem duo)
bayrou.target_audience: Political centrists, anyone who enjoys watching decades of patience pay off poorly, participation trophy enthusiasts
memes: Be careful what you wish for

hanouna.name: Cyril Hanouna
hanouna.bio: France's most-watched—and most controversial—TV host, presenter of 'Touche Pas à Mon Poste' (TPMP) on C8 (Bolloré's entertainment channel). While not a politician himself, Hanouna has become one of France's most influential political figures by proxy, using his massive platform to amplify right-wing talking points and attack left-wing politicians. His on-air confrontation with LFI deputy Louis Boyard in November 2022 (where he called him 'a piece of shit' live on air) became one of French TV's most viral moments, earning him a €3.5 million fine from Arcom. In 2024, Arcom refused to renew C8's broadcast license partly due to repeated violations under Hanouna's show. Bolloré simply moved the show to a new channel. He's the entertainment-politics crossover that terrifies the establishment.
hanouna.meme_summary: The talk show host who insults deputies on live TV and gets fined millions but keeps coming back—France's political cockroach with the biggest audience in the country.
hanouna.best_takedown_angle: Mock his transition from entertainment clown to political influencer. A guy whose show was literally kicked off the air by the media regulator, and who called an elected deputy 'a piece of shit' on live TV, somehow has more political influence than most actual politicians.
visual_gags: TPMP studio as a political arena
C8 license revocation letter as wallpaper
Moving to a new channel like nothing happened
catchphrases: Je dis ce que je pense
hanouna.combo_partners: Boyard (the eternal nemesis from the viral fight), Bolloré (his boss and protector), Praud (fellow Bolloré media star), Mélenchon (political enemy #1)
hanouna.target_audience: TPMP viewers, political entertainment fans, anti-establishment crowd, anyone who enjoys watching TV trainwrecks

hollande.name: François Hollande
hollande.role: Ancien Président de la République, Député de Corrèze
hollande.bio: The former President of France (2012-2017) who left the Élysée as the most unpopular president in Fifth Republic history—then staged a bizarre comeback in the July 2024 snap elections, getting elected as a humble deputy in Corrèze. The man who was once the most powerful person in France now sits as a backbencher in the Assemblée nationale, raising his hand to ask questions like a freshman. He joined the NFP alliance and his return was both celebrated (name recognition) and mocked (why would a former president want to be a deputy?). Known for his 'Mr. Normal' image, his scooter rides to visit Julie Gayet, and his legendary political blandness that somehow produced one of France's most dramatic presidencies (terror attacks, state of emergency, the Léonarda affair).
hollande.meme_summary: The former president who went from running France to being a backbench deputy—the ultimate political downgrade, like going from CEO to intern at the same company.
hollande.archetype: The comeback downgrade / Mr. Normal returns
hollande.best_takedown_angle: Mock the spectacular downgrade—from President of France to random deputy in Corrèze. The man who ran a nuclear power can't even get committee chair. Also: the scooter-to-Julie-Gayet saga is eternally mockable.
visual_gags: Raising his hand in the Assembly like a student
hollande.combo_partners: Macron (the protégé who betrayed him), Mélenchon (NFP awkward alliance), Valls (his PM who went rogue), Faure (PS leader managing his comeback)
hollande.target_audience: Political nostalgia fans, PS voters, anyone who enjoys watching former leaders in diminished roles, scooter meme enthusiasts

glucksmann.name: Raphaël Glucksmann
glucksmann.bio: The intellectual heartthrob of the French left who led the PS-Place Publique list to a surprise third place in the June 2024 European elections with 13.8%—ahead of Macron's Renaissance. Son of philosopher André Glucksmann, documentary filmmaker, and author, he's positioned himself as the 'clean' left alternative to Mélenchon. His success in 2024 revived PS hopes and established him as a potential 2027 presidential candidate. He's the anti-Mélenchon: soft-spoken, pro-European, pro-Ukraine, and allergic to revolutionary rhetoric. Married to journalist Léa Salamé (France Inter / France 2), making them French politics' most intellectual power couple. His main vulnerability: being seen as too bourgeois, too Parisian, and too intellectual for the working-class voters the left needs.
glucksmann.meme_summary: The philosopher's son who became the left's boyfriend—soft-spoken, good-looking, pro-European, and married to a famous journalist. He's basically the left's answer to Bardella but with reading glasses.
glucksmann.archetype: The intellectual heartthrob / Clean left hope
glucksmann.best_takedown_angle: Mock his bourgeois intellectualism—he's the left-wing candidate for people who shop at organic markets and read Le Monde. The 'clean left' that's too clean to get dirty with actual working-class politics.
visual_gags: Power couple photos with Léa Salamé
glucksmann.combo_partners: Mélenchon (the left's civil war—intellectual vs firebrand), Bardella (young vs young across the aisle), Macron (centrist rival for pro-EU voters), Faure (PS alliance partner)
glucksmann.target_audience: Pro-European left, intellectual bourgeoisie, anti-Mélenchon leftists, young progressive voters

tondelier.name: Marine Tondelier
tondelier.bio: The fiery redhead who took over leadership of the French Greens in December 2022 and became one of the breakout stars of the 2024 political crisis. A former municipal councillor from Hénin-Beaumont (Marine Le Pen's territory), she's known for her sharp tongue, colorful scarves, and willingness to throw punches at both the far-right AND the far-left. She was a key architect of the NFP coalition in 2024 and has emerged as one of the left's most visible and combative figures—the Green who's not afraid to fight. Her background in Le Pen's backyard gives her anti-RN credentials that other left-wing politicians can only dream of. She's been called 'the most dangerous woman for the RN' and could be a dark horse for 2027.
tondelier.meme_summary: The green warrior from Le Pen's own backyard—a redhead with colorful scarves who fights the far-right with one hand and Mélenchon with the other.
tondelier.archetype: The eco-warrior / Anti-RN crusader from behind enemy lines
tondelier.best_takedown_angle: Mock her attempts to make ecology cool through combativeness—she's basically the Green party's attack dog, which is an unusual look for a party known for hugging trees. The scarves are doing heavy lifting as a personal brand.
visual_gags: Standing in Hénin-Beaumont surrounded by RN posters
The redhead vs blonde (Le Pen) visual
catchphrases: Je viens d'Hénin-Beaumont, je connais le RN
L'écologie c'est aussi un combat social
Les écharpes, c'est ma marque de fabrique
tondelier.combo_partners: Le Pen (the territorial rivalry—Green from RN's hometown), Mélenchon (NFP alliance tensions), Doucet (green mayors network), Glucksmann (potential left-wing alliance)
tondelier.target_audience: Green voters, anti-RN activists, young progressive voters, scarf enthusiasts
memes: The green from Le Pen's backyard

danielle_obono.name: Danielle Obono
danielle_obono.bio: Députée de Seine-Saint-Denis depuis 2017, Danielle Obono est une figure controversée de LFI. Proche de Mélenchon, elle a fait l'objet de nombreuses controverses pour ses positions sur l'immigration et ses liens avec des personnages problématiques. En 2024, elle a été au centre de plusieurs polémiques médiatiques.
danielle_obono.meme_summary: The out-of-touch Paris elite who tells working-class French to accept more immigration while living in the 93
danielle_obono.best_takedown_angle: Mock her as a wealthy Parisian telling the working class what to think while she lives in a bubble. "She's from the 93" becomes ironic when she's clearly not living their reality.
visual_gags: Seine-Saint-Denis backdrop while being out of touch
danielle_obono.target_audience: Right-wing who hates LFI hypocrisy, suburban voters, working class

alexis_corbiere.name: Alexis Corbière
alexis_corbiere.bio: Députée de Seine-Saint-Denis depuis 2017, porte-parole historique de LFI. Ancien profesor, proche de Mélenchon. Visible sur les chaînes info pour défendre les positions de LFI.
alexis_corbiere.meme_summary: The angry LFI spokesperson who yells at TV cameras about inequality while living in Paris
alexis_corbiere.best_takedown_angle: Mock his constant anger and hypocrisy - screams about workers but lives in Paris

adrien_quatennens.name: Adrien Quatennens
adrien_quatennens.bio: Déouté du Nord, figure rising de LFI. A été coordinateur national du parti. Controversé pour des affaires personnelles en 2022-2023.
adrien_quatennens.meme_summary: The young rising star of LFI who got caught in a scandal and had to step back
adrien_quatennens.best_takedown_angle: The "hypocrisy" angle - talks about morality but got caught

michel_pavlakis.name: Michel Pavlakis
michel_pavlakis.bio: Déouté LFI des Bouches-du-Rhône, membre de la France Insoumise depuis sa création. Visible dans les médias régionaux et nationaux.
michel_pavlakis.meme_summary: The LFI deputy from Marseille who is known for his communist past and fiery speeches
michel_pavlakis.best_takedown_angle: Mock his communist background - talks about workers but wants to seize the means of production

ugo_bernalicis.name: Ugo Bernalicis
ugo_bernalicis.bio: Déouté du Nord, avocat de formation. Membre de la France Insoumise, connu pour ses prises de position sur la justice et les libertés.
ugo_bernalicis.meme_summary: The lawyer-turned-deputy who uses legal jargon to defend LFI positions
ugo_bernalicis.best_takedown_angle: Mock his lawyer speak - always citing laws while ignoring reality

danielle_simonnet.name: Danielle Simonnet
danielle_simonnet.bio: Députée LFI de Paris, figure médiatique du parti. Candidate à la mairie de Paris en 2020. Connue pour ses prises de position radicales.
danielle_simonnet.meme_summary: The radical Paris LFI deputy who ran for mayor and lost badly
danielle_simonnet.best_takedown_angle: Mock her failed mayoral run - talks about Paris but Parisians rejected her

raphael_arnault.name: Raphaël Arnault
raphael_arnault.role: Déposé LFI du Rhône / Directeur de campagne
raphael_arnault.bio: Figure jeune de LFI, directeur de la campagne nationale. Impliqué dans la controverse de Lyon en 2026 après la mort de Quentin Deranque lors d'une confrontation avec un militant identitaire. LFI a refusé de l'expulser malgré les pressions de l'opposition. Ancien porte-parole des jeunes LFI, très actif sur TikTok.
raphael_arnault.meme_summary: The TikTok revolutionary who defends violence and gets protected by LFI anyway
raphael_arnault.best_takedown_angle: Mock how he's involved in a violent incident but LFI refuses to expel him - the party protects their radicals

nicolas_metzdorf.name: Nicolas Metzdorf
nicolas_metzdorf.bio: Déouté Renaissance de Nouvelle-Calédonie (1re circonscription). Ingénieur de formation, il est devenu le visage du parti macroniste dans l'archipel. En 2024-2026, il a été au centre de la crise calédonienne, qualifiant la situation d'insurrectionnelle et s'opposant aux indépendantistes radicaux. En janvier 2026, il a entraîné les élus macronistes dans sa fronde contre le nouveau statut.
nicolas_metzdorf.meme_summary: The faraway deputy from paradise who fights independence while living on a tropical island
nicolas_metzdorf.best_takedown_angle: Mock the irony - he's fighting for France while living on a tropical island. "Nice work if you can get it" energy.
visual_gags: Tropical beach background while talking about crisis
Nice island life vs mainland problems

sebastien_chenu.name: Sébastien Chenu
sebastien_chenu.bio: Déoué RN du Pas-de-Calais, ancien porte-parole du parti. Figure médiatique du RN, régulier sur BFMTV et CNews. Ancien membre du FN avant la dédiabolisation.
sebastien_chenu.meme_summary: The polished RN spokesperson who debates circles around leftists on TV
sebastien_chenu.best_takedown_angle: He's too polished - the " Vichy" or "le RN c'est le progrès" angle

laurent_jacobelli.name: Laurent Jacobelli
laurent_jacobelli.bio: Déoué RN de Moselle, directeur de la communication du parti sous Marine Le Pen. A fait partie de la première ligne du RN dans les médias.
laurent_jacobelli.meme_summary: The RN communications director who spins every disaster into a victory
laurent_jacobelli.best_takedown_angle: Mock his spin - everything is a win for RN no matter what

thomas_menage.name: Thomas Ménagé
thomas_menage.bio: Déoué RN du Loiret, figure montante du parti. Ancien assistant parlementaire, proche de la ligne dure du RN.
thomas_menage.meme_summary: The young hardliner who represents the new generation of RN
thomas_menage.best_takedown_angle: He's too extreme even for RN

philippe_ballard.name: Philippe Ballard
philippe_ballard.bio: Déoué RN de l'Oise, ancien journaliste. A été porte-parole du groupe RN à l'Assemblée.
philippe_ballard.meme_summary: The former journalist turned RN spokesman who still talks like a news anchor
philippe_ballard.best_takedown_angle: Mock his journalist past - "he used to criticize politicians, now he's one"

julien_odoul.name: Julien Odoul
julien_odoul.bio: Déoué RN de Seine-et-Marne, porte-parole du groupe RN à la région Île-de-France. Figure visible sur les questions de sécurité et d'immigration.
julien_odoul.meme_summary: The angry RN spokesperson who specializes in law and order topics
julien_odoul.best_takedown_angle: He's always angry about crime/immigration - predictable

nathalie_oziol.name: Nathalie Oziol
nathalie_oziol.bio: Déouée RN de l'Hérault, ancienne magistrate. A quitté le judiciaire pour la politique.
nathalie_oziol.meme_summary: The former judge who now makes laws she used to apply
nathalie_oziol.best_takedown_angle: Mock the career change - from judging to making laws

olivier_marleix.name: Olivier Marleix
olivier_marleix.bio: Déoué LR d'Eure-et-Loir, président du groupe LR à l'Assemblée jusqu'en 2024. Figure de l'opposition conservateur.
olivier_marleix.meme_summary: The LR leader who criticizes Macron but can't win
olivier_marleix.best_takedown_angle: He's been opposing for decades but LR keeps losing

aurelien_pradie.name: Aurélien Pradié
aurelien_pradie.bio: Déoué LR du Lot, figure médiatique du parti. Connu pour ses prises de position clivantes et son personnage médiatique.
aurelien_pradie.meme_summary: The controversial LR deputy who says outrageous things
aurelien_pradie.best_takedown_angle: Mock his controversial statements - he says things even his party regrets
aurelien_pradie.target_audience: People who love or hate him

pierre_cazeneuve.name: Pierre Cazeneuve
pierre_cazeneuve.bio: Déoué Renaissance du Morbihan, proche de Gabriel Attal. Figure médiatique du parti.
pierre_cazeneuve.meme_summary: The young Macron loyalist who represents the future of the party
pierre_cazeneuve.best_takedown_angle: Too loyal to Macron, no personality

sacha_houlie.name: Sacha Houlié
sacha_houlie.bio: Déoué Renaissance de Vienne, président de la commission des lois à l'Académie. Figure intellectuelle du macronisme.
sacha_houlie.meme_summary: The intellectual Macronist who writes laws no one reads
sacha_houlie.best_takedown_angle: Too academic, out of touch with real France

marie_lebec.name: Marie Lebec
marie_lebec.bio: Déouée Renaissance des Yvelines, proche de Yaël Braun-Pivet. Figure de la majorité.
marie_lebec.meme_summary: The Yvelines deputy who represents the Macron majority
marie_lebec.best_takedown_angle: Part of the silent majority that supports everything Macron does

boris_vallaud.name: Boris Vallaud
boris_vallaud.bio: Déoué PS des Landes, directeur de la campagne du PS. Figure de la rebuilt du parti après 2017.
boris_vallaud.meme_summary: The PS campaign director who can't seem to win anything
boris_vallaud.best_takedown_angle: PS keeps losing, he's been part of every loss

carole_delga.name: Carole Delga
carole_delga.bio: Présidente PS de la région Occitanie. Figure régionale importante, parfois critiquée pour ses positions' ou ses voyages.
carole_delga.meme_summary: The PS regional president who flies first class while talking about climate
carole_delga.best_takedown_angle: Hypocrisy - talks green while flying private

emilie_chalas.name: Émilie Chalas
emilie_chalas.bio: Déouée Renaissance de l'Isère, ancienne magistrate. Figure du macronisme juridique.
emilie_chalas.meme_summary: The former judge turned Macronist who applies the law selectively
emilie_chalas.best_takedown_angle: Former judge now politics - conflicts of interest

hubert_julien_laferriere.name: Hubert Julien-Laferrière
hubert_julien_laferriere.bio: Déoué EELV du Rhône, figure des écologistes. Progressiste sur l'environnement mais critiqué sur d'autres sujets.
hubert_julien_laferriere.meme_summary: The green deputy who puts environment over everything else
hubert_julien_laferriere.best_takedown_angle: Only cares about climate, ignores everything else

pieyre_alexandre_anglade.name: Pieyre-Alexandre Anglade
pieyre_alexandre_anglade.role: Déposé Renaissance des Français de l'étranger
pieyre_alexandre_anglade.bio: Déoué des Français de l'étranger (Amériques et Caraïbes). Plus jeune député de l'histoire à 27 ans en 2017.
pieyre_alexandre_anglade.meme_summary: The youngest former deputy who was out of touch even by French standards
pieyre_alexandre_anglade.best_takedown_angle: Too young, too elite, too out of touch

yannick_favorel.name: Yannick Fav favorel
yannick_favorel.role: Déposé PS des Français de l'étranger
yannick_favorel.bio: Déoué PS des Français de l'étranger, représentant la gauche abroad.
yannick_favorel.meme_summary: The PS deputy for expats who never lived abroad
yannick_favorel.best_takedown_angle: Claims to represent expats but has never lived as one

jean_luc_melenchon_check.name: Jean-Luc Mélenchon
jean_luc_melenchon_check.bio: Fondateur et leader de La France Insoumise. Trois fois candidat à la présidentielle. Figures médiatique majeure de la gauche française.
jean_luc_melenchon_check.meme_summary: The angry old man who leads LFI and screams at everyone
jean_luc_melenchon_check.best_takedown_angle: Too old, too angry, too extreme

bruno_retailleau_check.name: Bruno Retailleau
bruno_retailleau_check.role: Déposé LR de Vendée, Ministre de l'Intérieur
bruno_retailleau_check.bio: Ministre de l'Intérieur depuis 2024. Ancien président du groupe LR au Sénat. Candidat à la présidentellede 2027.
bruno_retailleau_check.meme_summary: The hardline interior minister who wants to ban everything

christine_loir.name: Christine Loir
christine_loir.bio: Déouée RN de la 1re circonscription de l'Eure. Élue en 2022 et réélue en 2024. A voté pour dénonciation des accords franco-algériens de 1968. Ancienne候选人.
christine_loir.meme_summary: The deputy with the perfect surname who votes RN
christine_loir.best_takedown_angle: The irony of her surname - Loir voting for RN
